At t0.4/t0.7, two reps (t0.4|rep1, t0.7|rep0) completely fail by hallucinating an unrelated HTML/CSS Spotify web UI, and t0.4|rep0 accumulates four character-level OCR errors (apostrophe in function name, CHANSONS_FRAICAISES typo, broken aujourdhui.json literal, wrong arg placement).
